query:
INSERT INTO attendance.flex_segments (id, flex_id, seq, start_at, end_at)
                   SELECT u.id, u.flex_id, u.seq, u.start_at, u.end_at
                   FROM UNNEST($1::uuid[], $2::uuid[], $3::int2[], $4::time[], $5::time[])
                     AS u(id, flex_id, seq, start_at, end_at)
